ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual (e.g., Caucasian, Asian, African) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the individual (e.g., diseases, allergies) */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of the individual (e.g., genetic disorders) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genetic_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic profile */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual the profile belongs to */,
  "AGATC" INTEGER /* Allele count for the AGATC marker */,
  "TTTTTTCT" INTEGER /* Allele count for the TTTTTTCT marker */,
  "AATG" INTEGER /* Allele count for the AATG marker */,
  "TCTAG" INTEGER /* Allele count for the TCTAG marker */,
  "GATA" INTEGER /* Allele count for the GATA marker */,
  "TATC" INTEGER /* Allele count for the TATC marker */,
  "GAAA" INTEGER /* Allele count for the GAAA marker */,
  "TCTG" INTEGER /* Allele count for the TCTG marker */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was last updated */,
  "profile_status" TEXT /* Status of the profile (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the profile is active (TRUE) or not (FALSE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genetic_profiles_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marker_types" (
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marker */,
  "marker_name" TEXT /* Name of the marker (e.g., AGATC, TTTTTTCT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marker */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the marker was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the marker was last updated */,
  "marker_type" TEXT /* Type of the marker (e.g., STR, SNP, INDEL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual the demographic information belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual (e.g., Caucasian, Asian, African) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic record was last updated */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the individual (e.g., country, region, city) */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status of the individual (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, clinical staff) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic profile being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the profile */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the profile was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made (e.g., IP address) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES genetic_profiles ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profile_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a genetic profile */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genetic profile the version belongs to */,
  "AGATC" INTEGER /* Allele count for the AGATC marker */,
  "TTTTTTCT" INTEGER /* Allele count for the TTTTTTCT marker */,
  "AATG" INTEGER /* Allele count for the AATG marker */,
  "TCTAG" INTEGER /* Allele count for the TCTAG marker */,
  "GATA" INTEGER /* Allele count for the GATA marker */,
  "TATC" INTEGER /* Allele count for the TATC marker */,
  "GAAA" INTEGER /* Allele count for the GAAA marker */,
  "TCTG" INTEGER /* Allele count for the TCTG marker */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the profile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version (e.g., initial, updated, corrected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profile_versions_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES genetic_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin, clinical staff) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Level of the role (e.g., 1, 2, 3) indicating its hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_profiles, edit_profiles, download_profiles) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* Level of the permission (e.g., 1, 2, 3) indicating its hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  "role_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the role assignment */,
  "role_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profile_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genetic profile the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of the comment (e.g., general, medical, technical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profile_comments_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES genetic_profiles ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profile_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profile_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genetic profile the report is generated for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed, comparison) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profile_reports_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES genetic_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profile_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sharing event */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genetic profile being shared */,
  "shared_to_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the profile is shared to */,
  "shared_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who shared the profile */,
  "shared_date" TEXT /* Date when the profile was shared */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sharing event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sharing event was last updated */,
  "sharing_status" TEXT /* Status of the sharing (e.g., pending, accepted, declined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profile_sharing_shared_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profile_sharing_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES genetic_profiles ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profile_sharing_shared_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_to_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markers" (
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marker */,
  "marker_name" TEXT /* Name of the marker */,
  "marker_type" TEXT /* Type of the marker (e.g., STR, SNP, INDEL) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the marker was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the marker was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marker_profile" (
  "marker_profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marker-profile relationship */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marker */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genetic profile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marker_profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marker_profile_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES genetic_profiles ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marker_profile_marker_id FOREIGN KEY ("marker_id") REFERENCES markers ("marker_id")
)
